name: @podium/telemetry
description: Opt-in, two-tier anonymous telemetry: the schema of record, the scrubber, the capped queue, and the emitter [spec:SP-f933]. NOTE: ./example is the only browser-safe entry (zero runtime imports) — apps/web must import that subpath, never the bare specifier, which pulls node:fs via the emitter/queue/consent.
